content.en:
"Phoenix Realm, Liuhu Boundary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it weren't for the Terrans working as an informant at the Realm Tribunal headquarters, it would have been almost impossible for him to know this information.

After all, the Phoenix Realm is very far away from the Dongwu Realm, and there are six realms in between, even if the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce inquires about the news, it is impossible to find out the information of the Phoenix Realm.

"There are a lot of Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials in the Liuhu Boundary Rift, you can go over there!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Ye Tian kept shuttling, crossing one realm after another, and soon arrived at the Phoenix Realm, and then after exploring, he came to the Liuhu Boundary Seam.

The Liuhu Boundary Rift belongs to the very large Boundary Rift, so many top forces sit here.

Fortunately, the Terrans have been promoted to a powerful force, otherwise they will be intercepted when they come here, and they will not be allowed to enter the Liuhu Boundary Rift.

The "330" review here is very strict, and a level of honorable gods is not only to prevent the demon seed from breaking into the realm of the realm of the gods, but also to prevent unknown gods from indiscriminately breaking into the cracks of the Liuhu realm.

After Ye Tian reported his identity, he was able to enter the Liuhu Boundary Crack.

Wow!

In the gap of the Liuhu boundary, Ye Tian came in.

His goal is very clear, that is, to collect the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material, and if he can kill more demon seeds, then kill more demon seeds.

Immediately.

Ye Tian copied several bodies, so as to ensure that after the fall, there was no need to rush over again.

Subsequently, Ye Tian discovered that there were many middle-level demon seeds in the Liuhu Realm, and even high-level demon seeds were not very rare.

Ye Tian shot one after another, killing several middle-level demon seeds, and collected a lot of Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials from these middle-level demon seeds, which was a big harvest.

In the following days, every time Ye Tian collected some Xuanhua Demon Crystal materials, he would send the Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials back to the hands of another replica body to ensure the safety of these Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a high-level demon seed and wanted to besiege him.

But after only fighting for a few breaths, a number of high-level demon seeds shuttled over.

He had no choice but to retreat, otherwise he would not be an opponent.

After all, he didn't carry the Supreme Realm Soldier Tianyan Spear, and he was also worried that falling here would cause the Tianyan Spear to be lost, and it would be worth the loss.

Therefore, his current combat power is comparable to that of ordinary high-level demon seeds.

......

"Hey, there's a small Devouring Demon Crystal Vein here!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This was the first time he had discovered the Devouring Demon Crystal Vein when he came here, but there were already demon seeds mined.

He directly took action, killed the demon seed here, and snatched the Xuanwu Demon Crystal ore here.

But soon, a high-level demon seed came.

He tried his best, and under the siege of three high-level demon seeds, he escaped at the cost of serious injuries.

Coming to a safe place, Ye Tian sorted out his harvest.

"Three thousand six hundred pieces of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore, the amount is not bad!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

But just these Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal ores are still not enough.

He also needed more Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal material before he could raise his Eternal Dao Seed to his current limit.

Moreover, his wife and children also need this substance, so they need to collect some more.

......

The years passed.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian gained very little every time, and there were many times, he was besieged by high-level demon seeds, but every time he was seriously injured and escaped.

With his combat power reaching the high-level realm god, he will not fall so easily.

The harvest is small again and again, but the number of times is accumulated, and the harvest is naturally very large.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a high-level demon seed whose strength far surpassed him.

"It's a high-level demon seed comparable to condensing the eight Eternal Realm Spirits!!"

Ye Tian felt that his whole body was trembling, the strength of such a high-level demon seed was far from comparable to what he was now.

Moreover, the other party also has a Supreme Realm Soldier in his hand.

It's a scimitar-type Supreme Realm soldier!

The high-level demon seed came and tore it with a knife.

At this moment, Ye Tian had been completely locked, and even if he used the Tianyan Peng Light Technique, he would not be able to escape.

However, he still urged the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique and the Tianyan Xuan Tortoise Armor with all his might, but neither of these two Perfect Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques could withstand the sword of this high-level demon seed.

Burst!

The two perfect eternal realm spiritual spells were easily torn apart. []

In an instant, his body was cut off, and a terrifying force was burning everything in his body.

Before he died, he burned the Eternal Dao Seed and inflicted a blow on the other party.

But this blow only made the other party take a step back, nothing more.

Boom!

Copy the body and die!

"The high-level demon seed that condenses the eight Eternal Realm Spirits is really powerful!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Such a high-level demon seed, coupled with the Supreme Realm Soldiers, was enough to kill him in an instant.

Even if he is holding the Supreme Realm Soldier, he is definitely not an opponent and cannot block a move.

Unless he can raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit and condense the sixth Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, he will have any hope of competing with the other party.

......

Hundreds of millions of years have passed.

Ye Tian has killed countless times in the Liuhu Realm, and he has fallen three times, and he has been targeted by high-level demon seeds.

So, he's not going to stay here any longer.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian left directly from the Liuhu Boundary Crack and would not come in again for the time being.

Unless he has cultivated to the peak of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, he will not enter here again.

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian came back.

He sorted out the harvest of this time in the Liuhu Boundary Sea.

"The 168,000 pieces of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore, plus other Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal materials, if converted, it is equivalent to obtaining more than 300,000 pieces of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore. Moreover, there are many other resources and materials, and the harvest is very huge!"

Among them, most of the resources are obtained from those demon seeds by fighting with the demon seeds.

After all, in these years, he has killed a lot of middle-level demon seeds in 4.1, and even intercepted and killed three high-level demon seeds with heavy damage.

Those three high-level demon species were all severely injured in the battle with other high-level realm gods, and he happened to encounter them, and then killed them.

Otherwise, he wouldn't have had access to so many resources.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian used all his strength to extract the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and then refined it to improve his Eternal Dao Seed.

However, the effect of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance is already very low for him, but if the amount is enough to do so, it still has a good effect.

As the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material continued to be consumed, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed increased little by little, making the Eternal Dao Seed gradually grow, and it was getting closer and closer to the current limit.

Five billion to the end of the Dao era.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has finally been raised to the current limit.
